props.name: alignItems
props.description: Determines how the child elements will be aligned based on the [align-items](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/align-items) property of the CSS Flexbox.

props.name: direction
props.description: Defines the direction in which the content is laid out.

props.name: size
props.description: Defines the spacing between the individual items of the content.
